commit.message:
Fix tile rendering: viewport uniform visibility and far plane clipping (#51)

1. Fix viewport bind group layout to include FRAGMENT stage visibility.
   The small-circle clipping in raster_tile_globe.wgsl reads
   viewport.clip_sphere in the fragment shader, but the BGL only had
   VERTEX visibility, causing wgpu validation errors and broken rendering.

2. Fix far plane for pitched views. The aggressive far=cam_h*4.0 clipped
   distant tiles when pitch > 45°. Now uses a pitch-aware multiplier
   (4.0 + 8.0*sin(pitch)) in both the f64 VP and f32 uniform paths.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Myh51Dj3nno2e6nncbEomz

Add learning guide to Collibra preparation page

6 targeted study areas based on Kevin's profile gaps:
- Presales & Discovery Skills (critical): MEDDPICC, discovery calls, POC structure
- Product Demo Delivery (critical): demo narratives, full platform breadth, integrations
- Competitive Landscape (high): Informatica, Alation, Atlan, Purview positioning
- AI Governance & Regulatory (high): EU AI Act, ISO 42001, agentic AI governance
- Customer Success & Adoption (high): value realization, adoption metrics, NRR
- The Transition Narrative (critical): career pivot framing, proto-CE moments

Each section includes why it matters, urgency level, and specific
actionable items. Renders as collapsible cards with color-coded
urgency borders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(matching): bypass entity-binding hard-stop for banker-confirmed docs (#168)

The entity-binding filter in Step 2b of runMatch.ts strips unbound
entity-scoped slots in multi-entity deals. This correctly prevents
auto-attach ambiguity for AI-classified docs, but it also blocks all
banker-confirmed documents (BTR/PTR 2022/2023) because their slots
have required_entity_id = null after synthetic entity creation.

Fix: skip the entity-binding filter when matchSource is "manual" or
"manual_confirmed". The banker is the identity authority — confirmed
docs do not need entity-binding protection. Type constraints still
prevent cross-type mismatches.

Also: processConfirmedIntake now passes matchSource: "manual_confirmed"
(instead of undefined) for all non-manually-corrected confirmed docs,
so the entity-binding bypass applies to the entire confirmed batch.

commit.message:
Switch MCP to WebStandardStreamableHTTPServerTransport

Replace Node.js IncomingMessage/ServerResponse shim with the SDK's
native Web Standard transport. Fixes Accept header override that
wasn't working through the Node.js adapter layer. Resolves 406
errors from ChatGPT and other MCP clients.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: enforce consistent mechanic boundaries across all game states

Five consistency fixes applied to Game3D.tsx:

1. Attack guard — doAttack() now exits early when player is possessing a
   sheep, on a boat, on the rocket, or inside the space station. Previously
   the attack sound and cooldown were consumed even with no visible weapon.

2. Coin healing — collecting a coin restores 20 HP (COIN_HEAL_AMOUNT, capped
   at PLAYER_MAX_HP). Coins were previously tracked but had no gameplay effect,
   leaving the collection mechanic disconnected from the combat system.
   A green '+N HP' popup reuses the existing attackEffect element.

3. Game over screen — added coins collected display (X / total) alongside
   the existing foxes and catapults defeated stats.

4. Sheep flee suppression during possession — sheep no longer flee from the
   player body while the player controls a possessed sheep. The previous
   behaviour caused all nearby sheep to cascade-flee, contradicting the
   intended immersive sheep-perspective experience.

5. Damage immunity in rocket / space station — fox attacks and cannonball
   hits check !onRocketRef && !inSpaceStationRef before applying damage.
   Players were reachable by ground enemies even at Y=165 (rocket) and
   Y=2000 (space station).

Tests: 39 new tests in __tests__/mechanicsConsistency.test.ts cover all
five fixes with pure-logic simulations. All 39 pass; existing suite
unchanged (pre-existing failures in meshBuilders/Game3D unrelated).

Docs: added docs/mechanics-consistency.md; updated docs/weapon-system.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(tiles): persist and render custom tilesets (#185)

* feat(tiles): add dynamic tileset infrastructure

Add loadFromImage() and unload() to TilesetRegistry for dynamically
loaded tilesets that bypass the asset bundle. Add toJson()/fromJson()
serialization to Tileset for persistence of custom tileset metadata.
Add isCustom flag to distinguish dynamic tilesets from predefined ones.

This is the foundation for importing arbitrary TMX files with external
tilesets — Phase 1 of the TMX zip bundle import feature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(tmx): add analyze() and importWithCustomTilesets() for arbitrary tilesets

Add InMemoryTsxProvider for resolving external TSX files from zip bundles.
Add TmxImporter.analyze() for pre-import tileset resolution checking.
Add TmxImporter.importWithCustomTilesets() for importing TMX files with
non-predefined tilesets by providing custom image bytes. Unresolved
tilesets get content-hash-based IDs (custom_{sha256_prefix16}).

Refactor existing import() to share conversion logic via _convertMap().
Add xml as direct dependency (was transitive via tiled).

Phase 2 of 5 for arbitrary TMX file import support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(import): add zip bundle upload for TMX import with custom tilesets

Add .zip Bundle button to the TMX import tab for uploading zip archives
containing TMX + TSX + PNG files. Zip extraction resolves TSX references,
collects image bytes by path and filename, and passes them through to
importWithCustomTilesets().

Add loadFromTmxWithCustomTilesets() to MapEditorState for the zip flow.
Add archive as direct dependency (was transitive).
Extract zip parsing into testable extractZipBundle() function.

Phase 3 of 5 for arbitrary TMX file import support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(tiles): persist and render custom tilesets (Phases 4 & 5)

Custom tilesets imported via zip are now fully functional:
- GameMap stores customTilesets metadata for Firestore round-trip
- TileMapFormat serializes/deserializes custom tileset definitions
- MapEditorState tracks custom tileset data and image bytes
- TilesetStorageService uploads/downloads images to Firebase Storage
- Editor preview registers tilesets eagerly on import via callback
- TechWorld downloads missing custom tilesets on map load
- TilePalette renders custom tilesets via MemoryImage
- setActiveLayer preserves brush selection for custom tilesets

commit.message:
Normalize blank tenant ids to null (#7615)

* Add failing tests for blank tenant ID bypassing partition interceptors

A SystemRequestDetails with a blank tenant ID ("") incorrectly bypasses
the interceptor chain in BaseRequestPartitionHelperSvc, causing
"HAPI-2223: Partition IDs have not been set" when searching for
non-patient-compartment resources (e.g. Organization) in unnamed
partition mode with PatientIdPartitionInterceptor.

These tests reproduce the bug and will pass once the fix is applied.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix blank tenant ID bypassing partition interceptor chain

A blank tenant ID ("") on SystemRequestDetails was incorrectly treated
as an explicit partition, bypassing the interceptor chain. This caused
"HAPI-2223: Partition IDs have not been set" when searching for
non-patient-compartment resources in unnamed partition mode.

- Use StringUtils.isNotBlank() instead of null checks for tenant ID
- Add safety-net in validateAndNormalizePartition() for unnamed partition
  mode when partition names can't resolve to IDs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* changelog

* add better fix

* more tests

Separate game logic from porting infrastructure

Split ox/ into three concerns:
- ox/: pure OCaml game logic (15 ox_*.ml modules)
- ox-bridge/: C↔OCaml bridge adapters and glue (bridge.c/h + *.ml)
- tools/: testing infrastructure (parity, input recorder/replayer, smoke test)

Also moved ox/oracle/ → ox/tests/oracle/, merged bridge library+executable
into single dune executable stanza, renamed bridge modules to drop redundant
_bridge suffix, and changed callback registration from top-level let () to
explicit register_callbacks () functions called from ox-bridge/bridge.ml.

commit.message:
v1.2.0: View Transitions API, JS safety hardening

- spa.js: Use View Transitions API (Chrome 111+) for smooth page transitions
  with slide-fade animation; falls back to opacity fade on older browsers.
  Respects prefers-reduced-motion.
- spa.js: Update og:title, og:description, og:url, og:image and canonical
  link in <head> after every SPA navigation.
- spa.js: Fire window resize event after swap so sliders, masonry and other
  layout-dependent plugins recalculate without extra configuration.
- spa.js: Skip inline scripts with non-JS type attributes (e.g.
  application/ld+json) in executeScripts() to prevent JSON being eval'd.
- class-aio-autoptimize.php: Add SAFE_HANDLES constant — jquery, jquery-core,
  jquery-migrate, wp-polyfill, regenerator-runtime, wp-hooks, wp-i18n,
  wp-dom-ready are never deferred or moved to footer, regardless of settings.

Round 12 patch: 1200px boxed content containers from Elementor source

The original Elementor site uses max-width: 1200px for all boxed
content sections. Changed all max-w-7xl (1280px) to max-w-[1200px]
across every page and shared component:

commit.message:
Process softlink_folder_patterns independently of sync

~/organised was never populated because all sync pairs reference
cloud/external drives that are offline, so _process_excluded_folders_in_
directory was never called.

New _process_softlink_folders() collects every local path from
source_folders and the local sides of sync_pairs/one_way_pairs, then
backs up matching folders (.git, __pycache__, venv, etc.) to ~/organised
and replaces them with symlinks. Runs at the start of Step 3 regardless
of whether remote drives are available.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement felt-tip marker rendering with fiber overlay (#2)

Adds complete felt-tip marker pen support with rounded rectangle stamps that
rotate to follow stroke direction. Includes subtle anisotropic fiber texture
overlay via a new material effect system. Fixes three fiber overlay issues:

1. WebGL blur: Parameterized applyGrain scale via pixelAligned flag so fiber
   texture tiles at native 1:1 pixels instead of hardcoded 0.3x (which was
   stretching the 128px texture to 427px).

2. Texture follows stroke: Added per-stroke fiberAnchor computed from bbox
   origin, replacing screen-space offset so pattern is intrinsic to stroke.

3. No layering on overlap: Each stroke gets unique anchor enabling different
   fiber patterns when strokes overlap, matching pencil grain's per-stroke
   uniqueness for proper visual layering.

Also adds marker stamp texture generation with noise-based fiber detail,
stamp positioning with rotation and opacity control, and optional ink
depletion setting for gradual stroke lightening.

Material system now supports markerStamps body type with isolation, and
fiberOverlay effect with configurable density from pen settings.

commit.message:
fix: route staking through FeeProxy, registration via SDK (fee on stake not register)

- Fix MultiVault_SenderNotApproved revert: add ensureFeeProxyApproved() that
  calls MultiVault.approve(FEE_PROXY_ADDRESS, 1) once per wallet, cached in
  localStorage — required before any FeeProxy deposit operation
- Switch createAgentAtom/createSkillAtom to SDK.createAtomFromString directly
  so creator_id = user address (visible in Intuition Portal on mainnet)
- Fee model: 0.1 tTRUST fixed + 2.5% collected via FeeProxy on every stake,
  not on registration — reduces friction for early adopters (1 TX to register)
- First stake per wallet: 2 TX (approve + deposit), subsequent: 1 TX
- Add receipt.status check in createAtomViaProxy to surface revert reason
- Remove tagCreatedVia fire-and-forget calls (were causing unexpected 3rd TX)
- Update RegisterAgentForm fee display to ~0.002 tTRUST
